prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-2PCKTOOLHOLDER-BROWN Product Type: UTILITY_HOLSTER_POUCH Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 8.25 Inch Two Pocket Top Grain Leather Tool Holder with Belt Clip, Dark Brown Description: Do you have a favorite or high traffic tool that you need separated from other tools on your tool belt? Or do you just need a little more room on an already full belt? Whatever your end goal is, the ToolTreaux top grain leather tool holder can help.

The two, v-shaped pockets measure 4 x 2.25 and 3 x 1.75 inches with secure metal snap closures, and can be worn on any belt up to three inches wide. And, while the tool holder features a tunnel loop design, it also comes with a strong and sturdy built in metal belt clip, if attaching to your person, a separate tool bag or other is needed or preferred. Constructed from top grain leather, the high quality fabrication ensures longevity in the field and across many projects; the tool holder may be stiff upon arrival, but will soften with time and use.

With two main bottomless pockets, this versatile tool holder can hold pliers, cutters, a flashlight and much more, without length limitations. Ideal for separating a favorite or repeatedly used tool from other tools on your tool belt, this top grain leather tool holder from ToolTreaux gives you quick and easy tool access that is organized and secure.

Overall Dimensions: 8.25 x 3.75 x 3.0 inches

Material: Top Grain Leather

Large Pocket Dimensions: 4 x 2.25 inches

Small Pocket Dimensions: 3 x 1.75 inches Search Terms: gifts for dad Tool belt accessories leather tool belt boyfriend fathers day gifts framers carpenter electrician tool belt DIY mens stocking stuffers Small tool pouch with belt clip edc leather belt organizer construction tools plumber gardening Features: - TWO POCKET TOOL HOLDER: Durable leather tool holder with belt loop is a great addition to any tool belt to house extra tools; pockets measure 4 x 2.25 inches and 3 x 1.75 inches with pliers, cutters or other tools able to slide through the bottom of the pocket - TOP GRAIN LEATHER: High quality top grain leather ensures longevity in the field; while the tool holder may be stiff upon arrival, it will soften with time and use; can be worn with any tool belt with a width of three inches or less - BUILT IN BELT CLIP: If not needed on as tool belt, this high quality leather tool holder features a sturdy, built in metal belt clip to allow for easy attachment to your person or other tool bags as needed - TOOL BELT ACCESSORIES: Versatile leather tool holder with tunnel loop design and belt clip gives you organized and quick access to favorite or high traffic tools, separated from others on your tool belt - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.25 x 3.75 x 3.0 inches; Color: Brown; Material: Leather; Weight: 0.25lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
